title: dryopteris cystolepidota
intro: Dryopteris cystolepidota, also known as the New Zealand shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus and is native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Dryopteris cystolepidota include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a treatment.
